_meta.description: Single source of truth for UI structure. Documents current layout, target structure during refactors, and history. Agents MUST read this before any structural changes.

current_structure.description: Phase 2 complete. Route groups (public)/(platform)/(ops) created. MSW mock infrastructure in lib/mocks/. Zustand stores in lib/stores/. React Query wired with proof-of-concept. Centralized config in lib/config/. Auth personas with entitlements. Generated types from openapi.json.
current_structure.mock_data: MSW — lib/mocks/handlers/ with persona-scoped fixtures in lib/mocks/fixtures/
current_structure.state_management: Zustand stores in lib/stores/ + React Query in hooks/api/
current_structure.api_layer: React Query hooks in hooks/api/, MSW serves data when NEXT_PUBLIC_MOCK_API=true
current_structure.auth: Demo personas with role/org/entitlements in hooks/use-auth.ts, persona data in lib/mocks/fixtures/personas.ts
current_structure.components: GOOD — 59 Radix UI primitives in components/ui/, 34 trading components in components/trading/, 6 dashboards
current_structure.design_system: GOOD — globals.css with semantic tokens, IBM Plex Sans + JetBrains Mono, dark institutional theme
current_structure.registry_data: FRESH — lib/registry/ has latest openapi.json (298 endpoints), config-registry.json (46 configs), sharding_config.yaml, system-topology.json, ui-reference-data.json
current_structure.tests: MINIMAL — 4 unit tests, 2 E2E specs, coverage threshold set to 50% (target: 70%)

routes.notes: Service hub — entry point after login
DATA: pipeline status, venue coverage, freshness
LIVE TRADING PLATFORM: order entry, charts, P&L

target_structure.description: Route groups, auth personas, MSW mock handlers, Zustand stores, React Query hooks. See REFACTORING_PLAN_PHASE_1-4.md for full details.
key_changes: Create app/(public)/ route group — marketing pages, no auth
Create app/(platform)/ route group — THE product, same pages for internal AND client, auth required
Create app/(ops)/ route group — internal-only admin/deployment surfaces
Create lib/config/ — API config, branding, service registry with entitlements
Create lib/mocks/ — MSW handlers returning different data per persona (dimensional mocking)
Create lib/stores/ — Zustand stores with reset() for demo cache cleanup
Create hooks/api/ — React Query hooks consuming MSW handlers
Migrate 9,100 lines of inline mock data from lib/*.ts into lib/mocks/fixtures/
Wire useAuth() to demo personas with entitlements for role-based scoping

mock_handler_manifest._note: 16 handlers matching backend service boundaries. See REFACTORING_PLAN §2.4 for full details.
core_trading_handlers: handlers/execution.ts — orders, fills, execution results, backtest grids (client-scoped)
handlers/positions.ts — positions, risk groups, margin, historical (client-scoped)
handlers/risk.ts — limits, exposure, VaR, Greeks, stress scenarios (client-scoped)
handlers/market-data.ts — OHLCV candles, book snapshots, trades (shared, REST only)
platform_feature_handlers: handlers/alerts.ts — alert CRUD, severity filtering, acknowledge/resolve (client-scoped)
ops_internal_handlers: handlers/deployment.ts — services, deployments, cloud builds, shards (internal-only)
handlers/service-status.ts — service health, feature freshness, system overview (internal-only for full view)
handlers/audit.ts — compliance checks, event history, data health (internal-only)
handlers/user-management.ts — orgs, users, roles, subscriptions (internal sees all; client sees own org)

files_to_delete_after_migration: lib/taxonomy.ts (810 lines → handlers/data.ts or keep as lib/config/taxonomy.ts)

refactor_history.title: Initial Architecture & Rules Setup
refactor_history.description: V0 generated prototype with marketing pages, trading components, inline mock data. Architecture docs and coding rules established.

refactor_history.title: Rules Alignment for Next.js App Router + Dimensional Scoping
refactor_history.description: Rewrote .cursorrules, V0_SYSTEM_PROMPT.txt, REFACTORING_PLAN for Next.js 16 App Router. Added dimensional mocking (same endpoint, different data per persona), demo personas with entitlements, Zustand+React Query rules, cache reset protocol, MSW migration manifest, expanded SHARDING_DIMENSIONS.md with 3-layer model. Deleted stale CODING_RULES_QUICK_START.md. Refreshed lib/registry/ with latest OpenAPI/config/topology from generator. Updated workspace cursor rules in PM and codex.
changes: .cursorrules rewritten for Next.js App Router + (public)/(platform)/(ops) route groups
V0_SYSTEM_PROMPT.txt rewritten with one-platform model + 3 USPs + dimensional scoping
REFACTORING_PLAN Phase 2 expanded: shells in-repo, MSW migration manifest, type-gen, auth personas, state mgmt
REFACTORING_PLAN Phase 3 rewritten: route group reorganization, React Query migration, auth scoping
SHARDING_DIMENSIONS.md rewritten as 3-layer model (infrastructure + client + access/subscription)
CONFIG_REFERENCE.md references fixed to in-repo paths
lib/registry/ refreshed with latest generated files (openapi.json, config-registry.json, etc.)
lib/registry/sharding_config.yaml + runtime-topology.yaml copied in from PM

refactor_history.title: Phase 2 Structural Refactor — Shell Infrastructure + MSW Migration
refactor_history.description: Created route groups (public)/(platform)/(ops) with shell layouts. Moved all 32 page directories. Created lib/config/ (api, branding, auth, services). Set up MSW with 4 handlers (data, execution, strategy, ML). Created 4 personas (admin, internal-trader, client-full, client-data-only) with entitlement-based scoping. Added Zustand stores (filter, auth, ui-prefs) + React Query client + reset-demo. Generated 20K lines of types from openapi.json. Created proof-of-concept React Query hook (use-instruments).
changes: app/(public)/layout.tsx — PublicShell: SiteHeader + footer, no auth
32 page directories moved into route groups (URLs unchanged)
lib/config/ — api.ts, branding.ts, auth.ts, services.ts, index.ts
lib/mocks/handlers/ — data.ts, execution.ts, strategy.ts, ml.ts, index.ts
app/layout.tsx — wrapped with QueryClientProvider + MSW init

for_agents: CURRENT STATE: Full platform built. Routes restructured into nested services. 17K+ deployment-ui ported.
Old paths (/positions, /risk, /alerts, /ml, /strategy-platform) redirect to new nested locations.
5 demo personas: admin, internal-trader, client-full, client-premium (Vertex), client-data-only.
Staging auth gate: NEXT_PUBLIC_STAGING_AUTH=true enables password protection (Cloud Run only).
See ARCHITECTURE_HARDENING.md for doc/rule updates that define the target architecture.
Original lib/*.ts mock data files still exist — pages still import directly. Delete after wiring to React Query.
4 demo personas: admin, internal-trader, client-full, client-data-only. Switch via nav user menu or require-auth.
All references in docs point to files INSIDE this repo. No broken links to external repos.
rules: Any structural change MUST be documented here FIRST
Before making breaking changes, agent MUST ask user: 'I plan to [change]. Approve?'
If refactor spans multiple sessions, agent updates 'current_structure' to match actual state before resuming
